response.step_by_step_log:
1. Watched the video and identified the song 'Lifetime Showtime' performed by FUWAMOCO via on-screen lyrics and character identification.
2. Performed a web search for '"Lifetime Showtime" FUWAMOCO lyrics' to get official lyrics.
3. Extracted lyrics and verified they include bilingual (Japanese/English) content.
4. Mapped the timeline: 00:00-02:22 is the musical performance, 02:22-05:01 is non-musical dialogue.
5. Constructed the JSON object with the requested structure.
response.global_summary: A performance of the song 'Lifetime Showtime' by the virtual duo FUWAMOCO, followed by a post-performance intermission with dialogue.

scenes.description: Virtual characters Fuwawa and Mococo perform their original song 'Lifetime Showtime' on a colorful stage. Lyrics appear on screen in a mix of Japanese and English.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
It's show time!
一緒にいたいよ (Issho ni itai yo)
Lifetime, Showtime, Any time!
BAU BAU!
Yeah, future is bright
(Yeah, 二人は)
Fluffy, fuzzy, yappy sisters
Fuwa! Moco! Fuwa! Moco!
Fuwa! Moco! Fuwa! Moco!
BAU BAU BAU!
My heart, soul, and tail are fluffy
(Fuwawa, yay!)
I'm so fluffy that even I could float away
If you call for me, we're a bark away
Your smile is the treasure I want to keep safe!
Even though we're still just a pair
Of scaredy puppy dogs
The bond that we share as twins is irreplaceable
We're a pair, unbreakable!
And that's why!
いつだって (Itsudatte)
It's that day! It's that day!
Today!
Lifetime! Showtime! Not tomorrow!
BAU BAU!
一生涯 (Isshougai)
Sing with you!
Good times, bad times, it doesn't matter
いつだって (Itsudatte)
It's that day!
Lifetime! Showtime! Every day!
BAU BAU!
Yeah, Yeah!
二人は (Futari wa)
Happy, lucky, puppy sisters!
FUWAMOCO! BAU! BAU!
Everybody, BAU! BAU!
Hallo, hallo! BAU! BAU!
Everybody, BAU! BAU!
ダメダメノンノン！ (Dame dame non non!)
Don't touch the ears!
もふもふノンノン！ (Mofu mofu non non!)
Don't touch the tail!
チワワじゃないよ！ (Chihuahua janai yo!)
フワワだよ！ (Fuwawa dayo!)
チワワじゃないよ！ (Chihuahua janai yo!)
モココだよ！ (Mococo dayo!)
Twin demon guard dog sisters, yeah! BAU!
And together, we're...
FUWAMOCO!

It's not a chihuahua, it's a Fuwawa!

scenes.description: The performance concludes, and the virtual characters engage in post-show dialogue and banter with the audience.
